# Key Findings (auto-generated)

Factual rollup of the current feature dataset. Interpretation lives in the final report.

## Overview
- Posts: 24,824 across 2 platforms (youtube: 21,114, instagram: 3,710).
- Content date range: 2017-05-08 to 2026-07-19.

## Sentiment by platform (English)
- instagram: positive 85.5%, neutral 7.3%, negative 7.2%.
- youtube: positive 64.3%, neutral 21.0%, negative 14.7%.

## Engagement vs sentiment
- Avg engagement percentile by sentiment: negative 0.492, neutral 0.499, positive 0.508 (spread 0.016).
- Relationship is essentially flat (sentiment does not predict engagement).

## Dominant topics (by volume)
- T3: time, real, new, think - 13,014 posts.
- T0: business, help, digitalmarketing, brand - 3,501 posts.
- T7: understand, easy, easy understand, simple - 1,051 posts.
- T4: free, free praise, praise, paid - 881 posts.
- T6: start, right, company, scratch - 755 posts.

## Emerging vs declining topics (recent vs earlier in window)
- Rising: T0: business, help, digitalmarketing, brand (+8.57 pts).
- Rising: T3: time, real, new, think (+1.61 pts).
- Rising: T5: chat, gpt, chat gpt, voice (+0.3 pts).
- Declining: T1: course, step, completed, step step (-2.04 pts).
- Declining: T7: understand, easy, easy understand, simple (-3.41 pts).

## Top keywords (by volume)
- ChatGPT - 4,282 posts.
- Automation - 2,896 posts.
- AI Agents - 2,664 posts.
- Startup - 2,519 posts.
- Digital Marketing - 2,021 posts.

## Models
- Production sentiment model: vader (deploy-domain macro-F1 0.6493).
- Topic model: NMF, k=8, UMass coherence -1.061 (more coherent than LDA).
